Member of Parliament for Stroud

Dr Simon Opher was elected to Parliament in 2024. Prior to becoming an MP, he was a local GP for 30 years.

About Me

Parliamentary Updates

Help & Advice

List of services and contact information for a wide range of issues, including support for housing, health, welfare, food, disability, refugees, and domestic violence.

Contact Me

Ways for constituents in Stroud to get in touch. Residents can use the contact form, email me directly, or call my constituency office on 01453 621304.
